aws:requesttag/${tagkey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tags in the request

aws:resourcetag/${tagkey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

aws:tagkeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tags in the request

cloudwatch:alarmactions.description: Filters access by defined alarm actions

cloudwatch:namespace.description: Filters access by the presence of optional namespace values

cloudwatch:requestinsightruleloggroups.description: Filters access by the Log Groups specified in an Insight Rule

cloudwatch:requestmanagedresourcearns.description: Filters access by the Resource ARNs specified in a managed Insight Rule
